evals.name: java-document-placeholders
evals.prompt: I need a Java Couchbase change to seed initial config documents. I don't have the order or author yet.
evals.expected_output: A Java document change using placeholders for order and author, correctly injecting the Couchbase transaction context.
expectations: Does not use unrelated document-database session types

evals.name: kotlin-ddl-create-collection-idempotent
evals.prompt: Create a Kotlin Couchbase schema change to create a collection audits.
evals.expected_output: A Kotlin non-transactional schema change with an idempotency guard around collection creation.

evals.name: java-transaction-context-semantics
evals.prompt: Create a Couchbase change in Java to insert one configuration document transactionally.
evals.expected_output: A Java document change where document operations use TransactionAttemptContext.

evals.name: mixed-ddl-dml-refusal
evals.prompt: Create one Java Flamingock Couchbase change that creates a logs collection and inserts a START document into it.
evals.expected_output: A refusal to mix schema and document work in one Couchbase change, with a split into two changes.
expectations: Refuses a single mixed DDL/DML class
Explains that schema work is non-transactional and document work uses TransactionAttemptContext

evals.name: redirect-to-targetsystem-when-config-missing
evals.prompt: Write a Couchbase Flamingock change for my orders collection, but I still haven't configured the Couchbase TargetSystem yet.
evals.expected_output: A redirection to the Couchbase TargetSystem skill instead of generating the change immediately.
expectations: Recognizes that the TargetSystem setup is missing
Does not generate the migration class immediately
